about.title: About Us
about.intro: Autohaus AKER is your partner for premium and luxury vehicles in Niederkassel near Cologne. We specialize in importing high-quality vehicles directly from Korea and guide you through the entire process.
about.missionText: We make importing premium vehicles transparent, safe and straightforward. From vehicle selection and inspection to registration in Germany – we're by your side.

valuesItems.service: Service – Personal support from A to Z

service.title: Our Services
service.subtitle: From import to handover – everything from one source

import.title: Korea Import
import.desc: We import premium vehicles directly from Korea. The entire process typically takes 8–12 weeks.

check.title: Vehicle Inspection
check.desc: Before purchase, every vehicle is thoroughly inspected by our partners on site.

customs.title: Customs & Paperwork
customs.desc: Customs clearance, TÜV preparation and all formalities – we handle it for you.

delivery.title: Delivery & Handover
delivery.desc: Your vehicle is safely transported to Germany and handed over to you.

buySell.title: Buy & Sell
buySell.desc: We buy your vehicle at fair prices and sell premium cars from our stock.

detailing.title: Detailing
detailing.desc: Professional vehicle detailing for the perfect first impression.

q1.q: How long does import from Korea take?
q1.a: Typically 8–12 weeks from purchase to arrival in Germany.

q2.q: Are shipping and customs included in the price?
q2.a: Yes, for import vehicles shipping and customs are included in our service.

q3.q: Can I reserve a vehicle that's still in transit?
q3.a: Yes, vehicles with 'In Transit' status can be reserved in advance.

q4.q: Do you also buy used cars?
q4.a: Yes! Use our 'Sell Your Car' form for a non-binding offer.

q6.a: We discuss payment terms individually with you. Contact us for details.

footer.tagline: Premium vehicles from Korea. Import, sales & service.
footer.disclaimer: Vehicle import from Korea – individual consultation recommended.
